scripts.test:python-compile: python -m compileall services/api services/realtime services/worker services/agent
scripts.test:web: npm --workspace apps/web run test && npm run typecheck && npm run build:web
scripts.test: npm run test:web && npm run test:python && npm run test:rust && npm run test:desktop && npm run test:mobile && npm run test:docs
scripts.test:python: cd services/api && python -m pytest && cd ../agent && python -m pytest && cd ../realtime && python -m pytest && cd ../worker && python -m pytest
